allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(item['path']\) for item in data.get\('tree',[]\) if item['type']=='blob']")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d.get\('default_branch','?'\), d.get\('pushed_at','?'\), d.get\('stargazers_count','?'\), d.get\('language','?'\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); items=d.get\('items',[]\); [print\(i['full_name'], i['stargazers_count'], i['pushed_at'], i['language']\) for i in items[:10]]")
